02 — Spec Sheet

About

ProfileEducation

I'm Akashdeep — an engineer who loves turning complex problems into simple, scalable, real-world solutions. I earned my Master's in Engineering Management from Purdue and my Bachelor's in Mechanical Engineering from VIT, India.

My work spans manufacturing engineering, supply chain, and NPI — owning projects from planning through execution to deliver measurable gains in quality, waste reduction, and efficiency. I'm driven by data, clarity, and impact: if it can be measured, it can be improved.

Beyond engineering I'm into innovation, AI platforms, and building systems that help people and products perform at their best. Let's build something great.

Formula Student · Hybrid · Project Head

Team Uttejit — FSAE Race Car

Led design-change reviews integrating simulation with test feedback across a full-hybrid Formula Student vehicle. Engineered a lighter, sharper-turning steering system and a roll-cage validated in ANSYS & CATIA — earning a first-place Innovation Award.

Mechanical Design · CAD · 3D Printing · FEA

Steering Assembly & Custom Driver-Interface Mounts

Designed and packaged the car's full steering assembly — a carbon-faced steering wheel with an integrated dashboard and PCB, custom paddle-shift and quick-release mounts, and the steering column and rack linkage. Modeled in SolidWorks & CATIA, structurally validated the upright/hub in ANSYS, iterated packaging against suspension hard-points, and 3D-printed functional prototypes to verify fit, ergonomics, and clearance before manufacture.

SolidWorksCATIAANSYS FEA3D PrintingGD&TPackagingPCB Integration
DFM · Prototype → Production

Innovative Needle-Nose Plier

Transitioned a multi-purpose plier from prototype to production-ready design — validating manufacturability through CAM simulations, casting feasibility studies, and structural analysis in ANSYS & Fusion 360.
